speaker: Judge
text: The court is addressing parenting time and the temporary suspension. The child was not present during the library incident.

speaker: Petitioner
text: I requested parenting time for Lincoln's birthday through the co-parenting app and object to the suspension continuing.

speaker: Judge
text: The hearing is continued pending a HealthWest assessment and related documentation.

speaker: Judge
text: The court warns about interruptions and objections during the hearing.

speaker: Respondent
text: The show cause motion alleges prohibited contact and references app messages.
